title: Stat Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function Stat (Address As Integer) As Integer
parameters:
Address	Specifies the address representing the status of the Controller.

(integer from 0 to 2)
see_also:
EStopOn

PauseOn

SafetyOn

Stat Example

Dim ctr_stat As Integer

ctr_stat = m_spel.Stat(0)
